name: score
description_pt: Sistema de pontuação com combo multiplier e high_score persistente via SaveLoad. add_score(amount) incrementa, combo_window controla sequência. Emite score_changed, new_high_score, combo_reached.
description_en: Scoring system with combo multiplier and persistent high_score via SaveLoad. add_score(amount) increments, combo_window controls sequence. Emits score_changed, new_high_score, combo_reached.

signals.name: new_high_score
signals.description_pt: Emitido quando um novo recorde é atingido.
